Localization.Description: Attempts to log in to a DBMS under the same account from different hosts are detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed attempts to log in to a DBMS on host {event_src.host} under account {subject.account.name} from different hosts are detected
Successful attempts to log in to a DBMS on host {event_src.host} under account {subject.account.name} from different hosts are detected
